name: EGB OE TL.Z./DRAEGERWERK
summary: Draegerwerk AG & Co. KGaA develops, manufactures, and markets medical and safety technology products, systems, and services worldwide. The company operates through two divisions: Medical and Safety. Dräger's medical division offers products and services in the areas of anesthesia, ventilation, patient monitoring, and acute care information management; the safety division provides personal protection equipment, gas detection systems, and solutions for fire fighting, mining, and industry. The company is headquartered in Lübeck, Germany.
